It's just dropped 18th of March, 2026. What is Myo V2 Pro? Well, basically, it has over a trillion parameters with 42 billion active during use. Roughly three times larger than its predecessor, Myo V2 Flash. In plain terms, this is a massive AI brain. It supports up to a 1 million token context window, meaning it could read and understand enormous amounts of text in one go.
